message:
test: add 19 integration tests for bd update edge cases (dolt-test-4f0)

Covers: nonexistent IDs, invalid priority/estimate/due-date, long field
values (title limit + 100KB description), multiple field updates, field
clearing (description, assignee), status transitions, JSON output,
last-touched implicit ID, multiple issue batch update, and various field
types (estimate, external-ref, spec-id, design, acceptance-criteria).

Uses DualModeTestEnv for storage-level tests (direct + daemon modes) and
exec.Command for CLI validation tests where FatalErrorRespectJSON calls
os.Exit(1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
